entities.father: a father in a collared shirt
entities.mother: a mother in a green sweater
entities.child: a young girl with red hair and a blue cardigan

scenes.title: The Dinner Table
scenes.background_prompt: A warm dining room in the evening with a large wooden table fully set for three, a chandelier overhead, a window with curtains showing the night sky, and a sideboard with candles along the wall. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A warm dining room in the evening lit by a glowing chandelier. A large wooden table is set for three with white plates, folded napkins, silver cutlery, and filled water glasses. A father in a collared shirt stands at the head of the table, carving a golden-brown roast with a large knife and fork. A mother in a green sweater sits at the side, ladling soup into bowls with a gentle smile. At the far end of the table, a third chair is pulled out slightly from its place — its plate, napkin, and untouched water glass waiting neatly — but no one is sitting there. A sideboard along the wall holds candles and a basket of bread rolls. Outside the window, the night sky is dark blue.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place father at the head of the table, standing and carving a golden-brown roast. Place mother at the side, sitting and ladling soup into a bowl. Leave the chair at the far end of the table empty with a full place setting (plate, napkin, filled water glass) and pulled out slightly — the child (ghost entity) would appear here, seated at her usual place.
